Technical assessment of project analysis ==evaluates a project's feasibility, examining technical soundness, resource availability, location, and technology selection to ensure operational success==.

Technical assessment in software project management ==evaluates technical feasibility, architecture, and resource requirements to ensure project viability and success==. It involves analyzing technology choices, identifying technical risks, estimating costs, and planning implementation schedules. Key components include assessing hardware/software availability, system design, and security, ultimately determining if the project is actionable. 

**Key Aspects of Technical Assessment**

- **[Technical Feasibility Study](https://www.google.com/search?q=Technical+Feasibility+Study&sca_esv=cdf1ae9af23e2b08&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4FiJfV4gFBp8kkwrpED4e4L2U5Lw%3A1774344689914&ei=8VnCafi0N4GgnesP7sbfiQM&oq=Technical+assessment+of+project+analysis+in+software&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAk7dD8x4LBhssEVngUUFB6lijLj9tRGTlHkzjC66UtrPvxHmXtKgt-sTrD54ustXGHy1DmRMlIbfhc582GXeNaY-QZUQVhT32z91pUT7Lh99-jf4bEXtsCNTOltsrxQOksihmafWEMIcUrcYop1qiCDnFBS1chyY4gowLR-IYkUiPrZ6NTKgrOS09tZPSFdE2T0IRqSPeS2W71qiN-NosRGI6Nz9g6Ts0lrCLp4RoA7LPZM0D9Fp0gHwNdXorwWgKn0lOLAnEokiVOl5Lnyc0wNnotWUhbs5_wVYZMfZdmB7xFmT2pNCqcx7tsMioKwp1nTv63O8ee8l4MX1X7LPFFpa3xx2pz7i-5vZ2Yvelyl47GFf1mprTKXyOC3VlRtfZpaJLDfPEAnUh4EQzUeA&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwiamZ-OnriTAxUocGwGHdPmAeMQgK4QegQIAxAB):** Evaluates if the technology, tools, and infrastructure required are available and suitable for the project.
- **[Technology & Resource Analysis](https://www.google.com/search?q=Technology+%26+Resource+Analysis&sca_esv=cdf1ae9af23e2b08&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4FiJfV4gFBp8kkwrpED4e4L2U5Lw%3A1774344689914&ei=8VnCafi0N4GgnesP7sbfiQM&oq=Technical+assessment+of+project+analysis+in+software&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAk7dD8x4LBhssEVngUUFB6lijLj9tRGTlHkzjC66UtrPvxHmXtKgt-sTrD54ustXGHy1DmRMlIbfhc582GXeNaY-QZUQVhT32z91pUT7Lh99-jf4bEXtsCNTOltsrxQOksihmafWEMIcUrcYop1qiCDnFBS1chyY4gowLR-IYkUiPrZ6NTKgrOS09tZPSFdE2T0IRqSPeS2W71qiN-NosRGI6Nz9g6Ts0lrCLp4RoA7LPZM0D9Fp0gHwNdXorwWgKn0lOLAnEokiVOl5Lnyc0wNnotWUhbs5_wVYZMfZdmB7xFmT2pNCqcx7tsMioKwp1nTv63O8ee8l4MX1X7LPFFpa3xx2pz7i-5vZ2Yvelyl47GFf1mprTKXyOC3VlRtfZpaJLDfPEAnUh4EQzUeA&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwiamZ-OnriTAxUocGwGHdPmAeMQgK4QegQIAxAD):** Identifies necessary hardware, software, and skilled human resources.
- **[System Architecture and Design](https://www.google.com/search?q=System+Architecture+and+Design&sca_esv=cdf1ae9af23e2b08&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4FiJfV4gFBp8kkwrpED4e4L2U5Lw%3A1774344689914&ei=8VnCafi0N4GgnesP7sbfiQM&oq=Technical+assessment+of+project+analysis+in+software&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAk7dD8x4LBhssEVngUUFB6lijLj9tRGTlHkzjC66UtrPvxHmXtKgt-sTrD54ustXGHy1DmRMlIbfhc582GXeNaY-QZUQVhT32z91pUT7Lh99-jf4bEXtsCNTOltsrxQOksihmafWEMIcUrcYop1qiCDnFBS1chyY4gowLR-IYkUiPrZ6NTKgrOS09tZPSFdE2T0IRqSPeS2W71qiN-NosRGI6Nz9g6Ts0lrCLp4RoA7LPZM0D9Fp0gHwNdXorwWgKn0lOLAnEokiVOl5Lnyc0wNnotWUhbs5_wVYZMfZdmB7xFmT2pNCqcx7tsMioKwp1nTv63O8ee8l4MX1X7LPFFpa3xx2pz7i-5vZ2Yvelyl47GFf1mprTKXyOC3VlRtfZpaJLDfPEAnUh4EQzUeA&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwiamZ-OnriTAxUocGwGHdPmAeMQgK4QegQIAxAF):** Defines the technical architecture, including application, data, and system structure, along with assessing complexity.
- **[Technical Risk Identification](https://www.google.com/search?q=Technical+Risk+Identification&sca_esv=cdf1ae9af23e2b08&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4FiJfV4gFBp8kkwrpED4e4L2U5Lw%3A1774344689914&ei=8VnCafi0N4GgnesP7sbfiQM&oq=Technical+assessment+of+project+analysis+in+software&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfAk7dD8x4LBhssEVngUUFB6lijLj9tRGTlHkzjC66UtrPvxHmXtKgt-sTrD54ustXGHy1DmRMlIbfhc582GXeNaY-QZUQVhT32z91pUT7Lh99-jf4bEXtsCNTOltsrxQOksihmafWEMIcUrcYop1qiCDnFBS1chyY4gowLR-IYkUiPrZ6NTKgrOS09tZPSFdE2T0IRqSPeS2W71qiN-NosRGI6Nz9g6Ts0lrCLp4RoA7LPZM0D9Fp0gHwNdXorwWgKn0lOLAnEokiVOl5Lnyc0wNnotWUhbs5_wVYZMfZdmB7xFmT2pNCqcx7tsMioKwp1nTv63O8ee8l4MX1X7LPFFpa3xx2pz7i-5vZ2Yvelyl47GFf1mprTKXyOC3VlRtfZpaJLDfPEAnUh4EQzUeA&csui=3&ved=2ahUKEwiamZ-OnriTAxUocGwGHdPmAeMQgK4QegQIAxAH):** Analyzes potential technical challenges that could impact project execution, including potential security vulnerabilities.
